presets.label: Enemy Gauntlet
presets.description: Three floors with elevated enemy pressure and a tighter enemy roster.

gameConfig.objective: Survive three enemy-heavy floors and reach the final stairs.
openingLog: Challenge: Enemy Gauntlet — expect faster pursuit and fewer safe openings.

presets.label: Item Sparse
presets.description: Four floors where only healing potions may spawn as floor loot.

gameConfig.objective: Reach the stairs with minimal floor loot across four floors.
openingLog: Challenge: Item Sparse — only Healing Potions appear as floor drops.

presets.label: Full Depth Descent
presets.description: Bounded five-floor descent with an explicit final floor and ending.

gameConfig.objective: Descend through all five dungeon floors and escape at the dawn stairs.
openingLog: Challenge: Full Depth Descent — all five floors are in play with a fixed ending.
